cards.front: What is the primary brand archetype for WHSPR Assist?
What is the official tagline of WHSPR Assist?
cards.back: Hear more. See more. Live more.

cards.front: The WHSPR Assist brand voice is personified by a 52-year-old optometrist named _____.
What is the primary go-to-market launch channel for WHSPR Assist?
What is the core metaphor governing the brand's design decisions?
cards.back: A well-lit audiologist's office where technology feels like a trusted friend.

cards.front: Name the three distinct tonal registers used by WHSPR Assist.
cards.back: Compassionate Companion, Peer Professional, and Trusted Advisor.

cards.front: Which tone mode is used specifically for clinical peer-to-peer authority?
What hex code represents the brand's primary color, Trust Navy?
The color Warm Linen (#F5F0E8) occupies what percentage of the brand's color distribution model?
What is the specific functional application of the color Clarity Teal (#2A9D8F)?
cards.back: CTAs, hearing feature highlights, and interactive elements.

cards.front: What color is designated for active indicators and prescription badges?
Which font family is assigned for headers to communicate authority?
Source Sans 3 is the primary font family for what type of content?
cards.back: Body text, UI labels, and general reading content.

cards.front: For what specific purpose is the font family IBM Plex Mono reserved?
cards.back: Technical specifications, hearing profile data, and clinical readouts.

cards.front: What hypoallergenic material is used for the WHSPR Assist frame construction?
What charging solution was chosen to assist users with reduced dexterity?
What are the camera sensor specifications in the WHSPR Assist dual-camera system?
Name the 68-year-old retired mechanical engineer who serves as the primary buyer persona.
What is the single most important market insight regarding hearing aid adoption?
cards.back: 80% of hearing-impaired Americans refuse hearing aids primarily due to stigma.

cards.front: What is the estimated Total Addressable Market (TAM) for WHSPR Assist?

How much more expensive are traditional hearing aids compared to WHSPR Assist?
Which model in the capsule collection is described as a semi-rimless, lightweight frame?
What are the key features of the Assist Rx Active (V06-T) model?
cards.back: Sport square wrap-around frame, 260mAh battery, and rubberized grip.

cards.front: What items are included in the canonical five-item product flatlay?
cards.back: Glasses, magnetic charging cable, iPhone app, prescription card, and carrying pouch.

cards.front: What camera and lens configuration is mandated for brand photography?
cards.back: Canon R5 with a 50mm lens at f/2.8.

cards.front: Describe the visual components of the WHSPR Assist brand sigil.
cards.back: A sound wave arc cradling a lens element.

cards.front: What is the average delay between hearing aid candidacy and actual adoption?
Which persona represents the adult daughter and caregiver influencer?
What role does Dr. Priya Sharma play in the WHSPR Assist ecosystem?
What is the primary differentiator of WHSPR Assist compared to other smart glasses like Ray-Ban Meta?
cards.back: It is prescription-ready and includes clinical-grade hearing enhancement.

cards.front: What is the WHSPR Assist hero headline?
cards.back: The glasses your audiologist wishes existed ten years ago.

cards.front: What chipset platform powers the WHSPR Assist smart glasses?

What is the estimated battery life for WHSPR Assist Rx?
Which Bluetooth standard does WHSPR Assist Rx utilize?
What does the audio system's ANC and ENC stand for?
cards.back: Active Noise Cancellation and Environmental Noise Cancellation.

cards.front: What is the name of the crowdfunding launch campaign?

How much does the Caregiver Bundle cost and what does it include?
cards.back: $499 for two pairs of WHSPR Assist Rx.

cards.front: What is the function of the soundbytes SB-A through SB-J?
cards.back: They are modular brand messages for hooks, ads, and social media.

cards.front: Which AI model is used for precision brand assets like the seal and icon sets?
Which AI model is used for generating lifestyle photography and narrative sequences?
In the visual asset catalog, what does the seed 'v1' represent?

cards.back: To show the product integrated into a daily independent living routine.

cards.back: Apple Health app and Phonak marketing.
